metadata.description: 9-verb knowledge engine for Obsidian vaults — Karpathy LLM Wiki pattern, pure markdown prompts

plugins.name: claude-wiki-verbs
plugins.description: 9 verbs (ingest/query/save/lint/manage/synthesize/critique/compare/eli5) for compiling, querying, and maintaining an Obsidian Zettelkasten. Realizes Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern as a persistent compounding artifact.
